messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for laparoscopic sleeve gastrectomy for member NH-183947 with BMI 42, hypertension and obstructive sleep apnea. Attached: surgeon order and six months of supervised weight-management program records. The psychological evaluation is not included.
